metadata.name: nexus
metadata.description: NEXUS Protocol - Compliance-native programmable trade settlement and institutional FX venue on Solana

instructions.name: add_fx_liquidity
docs: Add liquidity to an FX venue pool

instructions.name: cancel_fx_quote
docs: Cancel an unfilled RFQ quote

instructions.name: check_collateral_health
docs: Submit updated collateral price and check LTV health (admin/oracle only)

accounts.name: admin_or_oracle
docs: The admin or oracle submitting the updated price. Must be the protocol admin.

accounts.name: admin_kyc
docs: KYC record of the admin (to satisfy compliance check structure)

instructions.name: create_escrow
docs: Create a new escrow with trade conditions and compliance checks

instructions.name: create_lineage_record
docs: Create a fund lineage record for source-of-funds audit chain (admin only)

accounts.name: previous_lineage_record
docs: Optional: previous lineage record for this institution (chain linkage).
Pass the system program as a placeholder when there is no previous record.
verified by the seeds constraint on the caller side.

instructions.name: dispute_escrow
docs: Raise a dispute for an escrow (importer only, within dispute window)

instructions.name: execute_settlement
docs: Atomically execute FX settlement: escrow release + FX swap in single transaction

instructions.name: fund_escrow
docs: Fund an escrow by transferring tokens to the PDA vault

instructions.name: fund_escrow_with_collateral
docs: Fund an escrow using tokenized commodity collateral (precious metals / RWA)

accounts.name: importer_collateral_account
docs: Collateral token account owned by the importer

accounts.name: collateral_vault
docs: PDA vault that holds the collateral tokens

instructions.name: initialize_fx_venue
docs: Initialize an FX venue and seed its base/quote liquidity vaults.

instructions.name: initialize_protocol
docs: Initialize the NEXUS protocol with admin, fee configuration, and KYC registry

instructions.name: liquidate_collateral
docs: Liquidate collateral that has been flagged for liquidation (admin only)

accounts.name: collateral_vault
docs: PDA vault holding the collateral tokens

accounts.name: treasury_token_account
docs: Protocol treasury token account to receive liquidated collateral

accounts.name: importer_refund_account
docs: Importer token account to receive proportional refund

accounts.name: admin
docs: Admin must authorize liquidation

instructions.name: post_fx_quote
docs: Post an RFQ quote to the FX venue (KYC tier 2+ required)

instructions.name: refund_escrow
docs: Refund escrow after expiry

instructions.name: register_institution
docs: Register a new institution with KYC record

instructions.name: remove_fx_liquidity
docs: Remove liquidity from an FX venue pool

instructions.name: resolve_dispute
docs: Resolve a dispute (admin only)

instructions.name: revoke_kyc_record
docs: Revoke a KYC record (admin only)

instructions.name: submit_condition
docs: Submit proof for a condition to mark it satisfied

instructions.name: update_kyc_record
docs: Update KYC record tier and expiry (admin only)

instructions.name: verify_lineage_chain
docs: Verify a fund lineage chain for regulatory inspection
Pass ordered chain records via remaining_accounts (oldest first)

errors.name: KycTierInsufficient
errors.msg: KYC tier is insufficient for this operation

errors.name: AmlRiskScoreTooHigh
errors.msg: AML risk score exceeds permitted threshold

errors.name: AmlCheckRequired
errors.msg: AML check is required before proceeding

errors.name: EscrowNotFunded
errors.msg: Escrow has not been funded yet

errors.name: ConditionIndexOutOfBounds
errors.msg: Condition index is out of bounds

errors.name: DocumentHashMismatch
errors.msg: Document hash does not match condition requirement

errors.name: OracleValueMismatch
errors.msg: Oracle value does not match expected condition value

errors.name: NotAllConditionsSatisfied
errors.msg: Not all conditions have been satisfied

errors.name: RateDeviationExceedsSixBfi
errors.msg: Rate deviation exceeds SIX BFI reference rate threshold

errors.name: TravelRuleThresholdExceeded
errors.msg: Transfer amount exceeds travel rule threshold but data is missing

errors.name: TravelRuleDataMissing
errors.msg: Travel rule data is missing or incomplete

errors.name: InvalidEscrowStatus
errors.msg: Escrow is not in the correct status for this operation

errors.name: CollateralValueInsufficient
errors.msg: Collateral USD value is insufficient to cover required LTV

errors.name: InvalidLineageChain
errors.msg: Invalid lineage chain: record does not link to expected previous

fields.name: record_id
docs: UUID — validated to MAX_RECORD_ID_LEN in create_lineage_record handler

fields.name: institution_id
docs: Validated to MAX_INSTITUTION_ID_LEN in create_lineage_record handler

fields.name: transaction_signature
docs: Validated to MAX_TX_SIG_LEN in create_lineage_record handler
